arg.name: robot_name
arg.description: TurtleBot name printed on the robot

executable.cmd: bash -lc "printf \"%s\" \"$(var robot_name)\" | robot-setup.sh && ros2 run teleop_twist_keyboard teleop_twist_keyboard --ros-args -p stamped:=true"
bash -lc "printf \"%s\" \"$(var robot_name)\" | robot-setup.sh && ros2 launch turtlebot4_navigation slam.launch.py"
bash -lc "printf \"%s\" \"$(var robot_name)\" | robot-setup.sh && ros2 launch turtlebot4_viz view_robot.launch.py"
